mapper.select:
SELECT COM_CD_ID AS cdId ,CD_VAL AS cdVal ,LANG_CD AS langCd ,CD_NM AS cdNm ,CD_VAL_NM AS cdValNm ,CD_SEQ AS cdSeq ,CD_DESC AS cdDesc FROM TBCODEBS WHERE 1=1
and COM_CD_ID like CONCAT('%',#{cdId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
and CD_NM like CONCAT('%',#{cdNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBCODEBS WHERE 1=1
and COM_CD_ID like CONCAT('%',#{cdId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
and CD_NM like CONCAT('%',#{cdNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')

SELECT COM_CD_ID AS cdId ,CD_VAL AS cdVal ,LANG_CD AS langCd ,CD_NM AS cdNm ,CD_VAL_NM AS cdValNm ,CD_SEQ AS cdSeq ,CD_DESC AS cdDesc FROM TBCODEBS WHERE COM_CD_ID = #{cdId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND CD_VAL = #{cdVal, jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND LANG_CD = #{langCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
select CD_VAL as cdVal , CD_VAL_NM as cdValNm from TBCODEBS where COM_CD_ID = #{cdId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by CD_SEQ

SELECT COM_CD_ID AS cdId ,CD_VAL AS cdVal ,LANG_CD AS langCd ,CD_NM AS cdNm ,CD_VAL_NM AS cdValNm ,CD_SEQ AS cdSeq ,CD_DESC AS cdDesc FROM TBCODEBS WHERE COM_CD_ID = #{cdId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND CD_VAL_NM = #{cdValNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND LANG_CD = #{langCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
